_instructions: HOW TO EDIT THIS FILE — This file controls all global links and contact info on the site. To change a link or email address, edit the value to the right of the colon. Save the file. The site will rebuild automatically when deployed. Do not remove any keys — only change the values.
_siteUrl_note: Update this value when the final domain is confirmed. Used for canonical URLs, OG image, JSON-LD, sitemap, and robots.txt.
